name: StayNest — vacation rentals
product: StayNest is a vacation-rental marketplace for booking short-term stays in homes, cabins, apartments, guest suites, and unique local properties. Its main features include verified listings, upfront pricing breakdowns, map-based search, host messaging, digital check-in, house manuals, group wishlists, voting, split payments, damage-deposit handling, host calendar sync, smart pricing, and post-stay reviews.

name: AuraQuill — AI marketing
product: AuraQuill is an AI marketing product for planning, generating, and optimizing campaigns. It supports email sequences, paid social ad variants, SEO briefs, customer segmentation, campaign calendars, A/B test ideas, UTM generation, brand-voice controls, approval workflows, CRM/ad-platform integrations, competitor-watch summaries, and performance explanations.

name: LumenLedger — personal finance
product: LumenLedger is a personal finance app for cash-flow forecasting, account aggregation, bill reminders, subscription and merchant alerts, savings buckets, round-up transfers, spending notes, beginner investing explainers, exports, and privacy/account controls.
